privileged_info_summary: The rename_calendar_event task operates on a synthetic event titled 'Marketing Campaign Review' scheduled for next Tuesday 14:00-15:00, with attendees Alice Johnson and Carol Martinez, location set to 'Zoom Meeting', and description 'Review Q3 marketing campaign results and plan Q4 strategy.' The task requires changing the event title to 'Q3 Marketing Results & Q4 Strategy Planning' while preserving all other properties (attendees, location, description). All data is synthetically generated by setup scripts using Odoo's XML-RPC API.
